checks.reason: The node is scoped to Sakitari Cave shell fishhooks from a layer dated to about 23,000 cal BP.
The scoped artifacts are shell fishhooks, not bone hooks.
The scoped node excludes nets and therefore should not depend on weaving or basketry.
Fixed fish weirs and traps should not depend directly on shell fishhooks.
Fish weirs should not depend directly on shell fishhooks.
Fishing spears and gigs should not depend directly on shell fishhooks.
Net sinker weights should not depend directly on shell fishhooks.
